converters.name: apache2timesketch
converters.description: Apache HTTP Server access (combined/common, other_vhosts) and error logs (2.4 and 2.2 formats) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: browser2timesketch
converters.description: Browser history (Firefox/Chrome/Chromium/Edge SQLite databases) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: cloudtrail2timesketch
converters.description: AWS CloudTrail JSON/JSON.gz exports to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: cloudtrail2vestigo
converters.description: AWS CloudTrail JSON/JSON.gz exports (file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: cowrie2timesketch
converters.description: Cowrie SSH/Telnet honeypot JSON logs (plain, rotated, or gzip) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: evtx2timesketch
converters.description: Windows Event Log text exports (wevtutil XML, evtx_dump XML/JSONL) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: filterlog2timesketch
converters.description: pfSense/OPNsense filterlog firewall logs to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: filterlog2vestigo
converters.description: pfSense/OPNsense filterlog firewall logs (plain or .gz, file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: journal2timesketch
converters.description: systemd journal (via journalctl JSON export) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: nginx2timesketch
converters.description: nginx access/error/redirect logs to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: nginx2vestigo
converters.description: nginx access/error/redirect logs (plain or .gz, file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: pcap2timesketch
converters.description: Packet captures (pcap/pcapng) to Timesketch timeline, decoded to Ethernet/IPv4/IPv6/TCP/UDP/ICMP/ARP headers.

converters.name: pcap2vestigo
converters.description: Packet captures (pcap/pcapng, file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload, decoded to Ethernet/IPv4/IPv6/TCP/UDP/ICMP/ARP headers. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: suricata2timesketch
converters.description: Suricata IDS/IPS logs (EVE JSON, fast.log, OPNsense syslog export) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: suricata2vestigo
converters.description: Suricata IDS/IPS logs (EVE JSON, fast.log, OPNsense syslog export; plain or .gz, file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: syslog2timesketch
converters.description: Linux syslog/auth.log (RFC 3164 plain text, rotated or gzip) to Timesketch timeline.

converters.name: timesketch2parquet
converters.description: Generic Timesketch-compatible CSV/JSONL (any column set, plain or .gz, file or directory) to a Vestigo Parquet file for direct upload. Column requirements follow upstream google/timesketch's own import spec. Requires pyarrow.

converters.name: webhoneypot2timesketch
converters.description: DShield webhoneypot (isc-agent) HTTP request logs to Timesketch timeline, incl. reverse-proxy X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-Ip client resolution and matched signature metadata.

converters.name: zeek2timesketch
converters.description: Zeek (Bro) NSM TSV logs (conn.log, dns.log, http.log, and any other header-described log type, incl. rotated/gzip) to Timesketch timeline.
